entry.string: Feature branch detected: JIRA issue=DEV-6, project=trading_agent, subproject=fundamentals

echo "Response code: 401" echo "Curl debug log (showing auth header info):" grep -i 'authorization\|www-authenticate\|401\|403' /tmp/jira_test_curl_debug.log | head -10 || cat /tmp/jira_test_curl_debug.log | tail -30 echo "" echo "Response body:" cat /tmp/jira_test_response.json | head -20 || echo "No response body"
⚠️ WARNING: JIRA authentication failed (HTTP 401). Please check JIRA_USER and JIRA_API_TOKEN credentials. Note: New tokens may take up to a minute to activate. Pipeline will continue.
echo "Response code: 404" echo "Curl debug log:" cat /tmp/jira_curl_debug.log | tail -20 || true echo "" echo "Response body:" cat /tmp/jira_response.json | head -50 || true
⚠️ WARNING: JIRA issue DEV-6 does not exist (HTTP 404). Please verify the issue exists at https://vittorioapi91.atlassian.net/browse/DEV-6. Pipeline will continue.

if [ ! -d "src/trading_agent/fundamentals" ]; then echo "ERROR: Module path does not exist: src/trading_agent/fundamentals" echo "Available modules in src/trading_agent/:" ls -d src/trading_agent/*/ 2>/dev/null | xargs -n 1 basename || echo "No modules found" exit 1 fi echo "✓ Module path exists: src/trading_agent/fundamentals" echo "Module contents:" ls -la "src/trading_agent/fundamentals" | head -20
Check Registry and Build Docker Image

wf.a.LabelAction.displayName: Check Registry and Build Docker Image

entry.string: Make Image Available to Kind Cluster

wf.a.LabelAction.displayName: Make Image Available to Kind Cluster

entry.string: # Clean up old incremental images, but preserve base images docker images hmm-model-training-dev --format '{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}' | \ grep -v ':base$' | \ sed 's/.*://' | \ grep -E '^dev-[0-9]+-' | \ sort -t- -k2 -nr | \ tail -n +11 | \ xargs -r -I {} docker rmi hmm-model-training-dev:{} || true
✗ Pipeline failed. Check logs for details.
Warning: GITHUB_TOKEN not set. Cannot post status to GitHub.
